summary: 190 hours of teaching assistant activities and 14 co-advised master's theses.

courses.title: Biomedical Wearable Technologies for Healthcare and Wellbeing
courses.subtitle: Master's in Bioengineering · ~30 h/year · ~40–100 students
courses.description: Lab support, project supervision, written exam preparation, technical expert in project discussions.

courses.title: Medical Informatics
courses.subtitle: Bachelor's in Biomedical Engineering · ~20 h/year · ~150–200 students
courses.description: Weekly homework management, task preparation, evaluation of submissions with oral examination.

courses.title: Seminar: Software as Medical Device
courses.subtitle: Clinical Engineering · Master's in Bioengineering · ~40 students
courses.description: Invited seminar on regulatory aspects and design of software as a medical device.

courses.title: Seminar: The AI Act for Clinical Engineers
courses.subtitle: Clinical Engineering · Master's in Bioengineering · ~40 students
courses.description: Invited seminar on the EU AI Act and its implications for clinical engineering practice.

courses.title: Seminar: Development of a real-life database for multicentric clinical trials
courses.subtitle: Medical Informatics · Bachelor's in Biomedical Engineering · ~200 students
courses.description: Invited seminar on real-world database design and management for clinical trial data.
